name: world-empire-game-server
description: Authoritative PostgreSQL multiplayer game server starter for a Steam/PC player-run economy game.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.start:prod: node src/migrate.js && node src/seed.js && node src/server.js
scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && find src/routes src/websocket src/middleware src/services -name "*.js" -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && node --check src/auth.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/economy.js && node --check src/migrate.js && node --check src/seed.js
